files.patch:
@@ -46,3 +46,3 @@ - *

A {@code ZipOutputStream} uses a {@linkplain Charset} to encode entry names, - * entry comments and ZIP file comments. A stream created without specifying - * a {@code Charset} uses UTF-8. + *

By default, the UTF-8 charset is used to encode entry names and comments. + * {@link #ZipOutputStream(OutputStream, Charset)} may be be used to specify + * an alternative charset.
